desc: [UPSTREAM] Track the asahi DCP driver M4/26.x support; prep j614s DCP DT wiring. simpledrm is the honest interim. Update 2026-07-21: chadmed's rough Linux dcp/14.8.3 branch now boots DCP and has HPD/brightness plus much of the service stack working; surface clearing and GPU-dependent delivery remain incomplete. m1n1 PR 630 reviewed at 7e391ffde033bf2fa0e22cc5bda575f83d2d584b. This is 14.x ABI/versioning groundwork, not J614s's macOS 26.x support; recheck as it iterates (done/2026-07-21-asahi-dev-log-review.md)
author: claude
